/usr/bin/cc  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC -m64 -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tjunittest-static.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/tjunittest-static.dir/src/tjunittest.c.o" "CMakeFiles/tjunittest-static.dir/src/tjutil.c.o" "CMakeFiles/tjunittest-static.dir/src/md5/md5.c.o" "CMakeFiles/tjunittest-static.dir/src/md5/md5hl.c.o" -o tjunittest-static  libturbojpeg.a
